detail.description: Giancarlo Stanton homers (2) on a fly ball to center field. Cody Bellinger scores.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe.
Giancarlo Stanton doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Mike Trout.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a line drive to center fielder Denzel Clarke. Cody Bellinger scores. Ben Rice to 2nd.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Heriberto Hernández. Ben Rice to 3rd.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Ryan McMahon scores. Aaron Judge scores. Ben Rice to 3rd.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a line drive to left fielder Heliot Ramos. Ben Rice out at home on the throw, left fielder Heliot Ramos to catcher Patrick Bailey.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Cody Bellinger to 3rd.
Giancarlo Stanton homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Harrison Bader. Cody Bellinger scores. Ben Rice to 2nd.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a line drive to center fielder Harrison Bader.
Giancarlo Stanton doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Jarren Duran. Aaron Judge to 3rd.
Giancarlo Stanton doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Jarren Duran. Aaron Judge to 3rd.
Giancarlo Stanton doubles (4) on a fly ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela. Amed Rosario scores. Aaron Judge scores.
Giancarlo Stanton homers (3) on a fly ball to left field.
Giancarlo Stanton doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Cody Bellinger scores. Ben Rice to 3rd.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a fly ball to right fielder Victor Robles. Ben Rice scores.
Giancarlo Stanton doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Randy Arozarena.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a pop up to third baseman Brendan Donovan. Giancarlo Stanton out at 2nd, third baseman Brendan Donovan to second baseman Cole Young.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a ground ball to center fielder Brice Matthews, deflected by shortstop Carlos Correa. Ben Rice scores.
Giancarlo Stanton singles on a line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson.
